fault_hypothesis: The fee is incorrectly subtracted from each participant's individual share on line 72, rather than being deducted once from the total `amount` before distribution. This causes the fee to be deducted multiple times, once for each participant.

spec.expr: ((amount >= fee) and abs(sum(__cbfl_result) - (amount - fee)) < 1e-9) or ((amount < fee) and abs(sum(__cbfl_result)) < 1e-9)

constraints.intent: The sum of all payouts must equal the initial amount minus the single fee, or zero if the fee exceeds the amount.

spec.expr: ((amount >= fee) and abs(sum(shares__1) - (amount - fee)) < 1e-9) or ((amount < fee) and abs(sum(shares__1)) < 1e-9)

constraints.intent: The sum of calculated shares should represent the net distributable amount (pool minus fee), not the gross amount.
The calculated total ratio must equal the sum of the input ratios.
